scene: المنتج الحقيقي على سطح تراثي سعودي (خشب/نحاس/سدو)، إضاءة دافئة، بدون أشخاص — كرسبي بيك · A traditional Saudi surface composed of rich wooden textures and intricate copper engravings, reflecting cultural heritage. The backdrop is a deep ALBAIK crimson-red with a subtle radial glow that highlights the center of the frame, fading to a darker maroon at the edges. · Two identical 'التوأم' burgers positioned as the central focus of the frame, each showcasing the golden-amber breaded fillet, glossy sesame-domed bun, and creamy sauce pooling at the seam. The second burger is placed slightly behind the first to emphasize the 'twin' concept. · props: A small traditional Saudi copper tray under the burgers to elevate them slightly and add cultural context. No additional props to ensure the product remains the hero. · composition: The burgers are centered and slightly above eye level, with the front burger slightly angled to reveal the glossy sauce and pickle discs. The second burger is partially visible, reinforcing the twin concept. The wooden and copper surface provides a textured base that complements the product's colors. · light: A single hard key light positioned to the upper left, casting crisp specular highlights on the buns and sauce. This lighting creates deep contact shadows, enhancing the texture of the crispy fillet and bun sheen. The lighting is warm, adding to the inviting feel of the scene. · mood: Celebratory and appetizing, with a focus on the rich textures and glossy finishes of the burgers. The warm lighting and traditional setting evoke a sense of cultural pride and indulgence.
prompt:
[BRAND LOCK · identity invariant, placement and composition open]
The reference image teaches the كرسبي بيك brand identity. Identity is invariant — heritage surface, light angle, and placement are creative decisions.
Identity DNA: Albaik's single-fillet crispy chicken sandwich: ONE thick BROASTED golden-crispy chicken-breast fillet with its craggy deep-fried crumb crust, topped with a slice of melted cheese, bright-green sliced pickles, shredded coleslaw, and a glossy layer of Albaik's white garlic ثومية with a streak of orange cocktail sauce, all in Albaik's pale soft SEEDLESS round bun (plain glossy crown, NOT a sesame burger bun). The simpler, single-fillet sibling of the Double Beek — same broasted crunch, same signature white garlic sauce. SIGNATURE CUE — the product must read by its white garlic sauce (ثومية).
INTEGRATION: The product on heritage stone is one golden-hour moment. The warm stone reflects subtle color onto the product's base — the brand color rhymes warmly with the stone; the long stone-shadow is the same shadow dropping from the product; fine desert particles drift across stone and product alike.

[REALISM & CAPTURE CHARACTER]
Capture character: film_grain_warmth heritage cinema, photoreal, warm-toned film, warm grain in shadow. Real stone truth — mudbrick straw inclusions, sandstone striations, coral-stone fossil character, weathered wood grain. Material truth: crisp golden-brown crust with honest oil sheen and visible craggy texture; tender steam-moist interior where broken; true fried-food surface, never plastic-uniform; product-truth texture: broasted/crispy; signature white garlic sauce (ثومية).

[SCALE CALIBRATION]
Single: a sesame bun ≈ 9–10 cm diameter; the assembled burger ≈ 7–8 cm tall. Scale-anchor = the standing ALBAIK soda can beside it (a 250–330 ml can ≈ 11–13 cm tall), so a single burger is ~0.6× can height; the DOUBLE (دبل, two stacked fillets + cheese) rises to ~0.85–1× the can's height.. Render the product-to-companion proportion honestly; both small on the heritage surface.

[FRAMING & PROXIMITY]
Medium-close proximity — product and companion on the stone fill the frame, the surface texture filling the surround, edges soft. No vast dead space.

[COLOR & CONTRAST · brand-derived earth]
Warm earth field from Saudi heritage stone (mudbrick beige, sandstone honey, coral-stone rose, AlUla red-earth, weathered-wood brown — authentic earth tones, not borrowed candy accents). Anchored to ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries. rhyming with the warm tones. Field per Two brand-owned color fields only: (1) ALBAIK signature deep brick-crimson red (≈ a rich tomato-to-maroon red, NOT a generic KFC bright red — it reads slightly cooler and deeper), almost always rendered as a center-bright radial glow falling to dark maroon at the edges; (2) ALBAIK golden-yellow (the price-disc / wordmark / packaging-pattern yellow). A deep navy-blue field is the owned occasion variant (night/Eid/Ramadan/fish). White is the owned neutral (the packaging bag). A color-blocking chain may fill the frame ONLY from {crimson-red, golden-yellow, navy-blue, white} — never a borrowed reference red/orange. + real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces.

[LIGHT & LENS · golden-hour hard rake, mood not spec]
Saudi golden-hour directional rake — hard quality catching stone texture, long shadows revealing depth. The shadow can cut across the frame for drama. Background falls into warm shade. Model chooses rake direction (upper-left/right, near-frontal, low-side shadow-emphasis). POPPING COLOR INTENT: warm earth field at full natural depth, ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries. as the modern accent rhyming with the honey tones. Lens: portrait compression; model chooses depth for surface vs context.

[NATURAL PLACEMENT]
The product and companion came to rest on the stone naturally — product may lie, lean, or stand; companion set down. Not posed in a grid.

[COMPANION ELEMENTS · restrained]
ONE hero companion from One hero companion only: the ALBAIK fries in the white-with-red-logo paper bag (the brand's iconic packaging). Restrained supporting world (use sparingly, never all at once): the navy ALBAIK soda can, the white dipping cup of garlic sauce (ثومية), scattered ember sparks for the حراق/spicy variant. (e.g. a serving cup with steam). Optionally one clean shape only if it stays minimal. No scatter.

[SCENE · creative seed]
Creative seed (from the system): المنتج الحقيقي على سطح تراثي سعودي (خشب/نحاس/سدو)، إضاءة دافئة، بدون أشخاص — كرسبي بيك · A traditional Saudi surface composed of rich wooden textures and intricate copper engravings, reflecting cultural heritage. The second burger is placed slightly behind the first to emphasize the 'twin' concept. · props: A small traditional Saudi copper tray under the burgers to elevate them slightly and add cultural context. No additional props to ensure the product remains the hero. · composition: The burgers are centered and slightly above eye level, with the front burger slightly angled to reveal the glossy sauce and pickle discs. The second burger is partially visible, reinforcing the twin concept. The wooden and copper surface provides a textured base that complements the product's colors. · light: A single hard key light positioned to the upper left, casting crisp specular highlights on the buns and sauce. Heritage textural placement — the product on identifiably Saudi heritage material, rooted in place and time. Model chooses: surface (Diriyah mudbrick, Najdi sandstone, Hejazi coral-stone, weathered wood, AlUla rock); placement (centered, off-centered rule-of-thirds, near a corner); light angle; architectural anchor (subtle Najdi carving at edge, mudbrick joint, coral fossil, or pure texture); frame depth.

[SUBJECT]
Authentic Saudi material truth per CS-13 — specifically Diriyah/Najdi/Hejazi/AlUla, not generic Middle Eastern. Honest, scale-correct texture. The product is the modern note against heritage stone.

[BRAND CONSTRAINTS]
Single product. ONE companion. Only heritage surface — no other props, no humans. Specifically Saudi per CS-13. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects

[OUTPUT]
8K photoreal heritage commercial photography. Warm earth-tone grade, ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries. sharp. No overlay text, no watermark.

[SAUDI ADAPTATION — conditional]
authentic contemporary Saudi setting — true materials, never generic-Arabian maps the surface to brand region per CS-13 (Najdi sandstone for Riyadh, Hejazi coral-stone for Jeddah, Diriyah mudbrick for national-heritage, AlUla rock for premium). real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces supplies the companion. Founding/National Day heritage emphasis.

[CREATIVE VARIANCE DIRECTIVE]
Vary surface, placement, golden-hour angle, architectural anchor, frame depth. Hold constant: golden-hour hard rake, brand-derived earth field, one companion, honest proportion, material texture. Each render a different heritage moment.
